name: Spells Y1
description: Basic spells available to all wizards

definition.name: Wingardium Leviosa
definition.description: A levitation charm that makes objects float in the air.
definition.visuals: The object glows with a soft white light as it rises.
definition.loreTag: One of the most fundamental charms taught at Hogwarts.

definition.name: Alohomora
definition.description: An unlocking charm that opens locked doors, windows, and containers.
definition.visuals: The lock clicks and glows briefly with golden light.
definition.loreTag: A charm popularized by Eldon Elsrickle in the 17th century.

definition.name: Reparo
definition.description: A mending charm that repairs broken objects.
definition.visuals: Broken pieces glow and reassemble themselves.
definition.loreTag: Essential for any witch or wizard prone to accidents.

definition.name: Expelliarmus
definition.description: A disarming charm that knocks an opponent's wand from their hand.
definition.visuals: A jet of scarlet light strikes the target's hand.
definition.loreTag: The signature spell of the Boy Who Lived.
